ticket.subject: supabase functions deploy fails: 'Cannot resolve' error on local file import
ticket.body: Attempting to deploy an edge function that references a utility file via `../utils/helpers.ts`. The deployment bundler throws 'Cannot resolve module' even though the path is correct and the file is present. The function runs without issues using `supabase functions serve` on my local machine. Does the production bundler have different module resolution rules?
